data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding DST handling with stored timezone snapshots.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for DST handling with stored timezone snapshots. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the system effectively manages and displays timezones considering daylight saving changes. The linked use case mentions the need for accurate timezone handling but lacks concrete evidence that this requirement is met, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system handles DST changes with stored timezone snapshots.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify DST handling with stored timezone snapshots.
